title: KaboomStick
description: A Fabric mod for Minecraft 1.21.x that adds explosive sticks to convert entire veins of blocks into TNT or launch massive fireballs.
body:
A Fabric mod for Minecraft 1.21.11 that adds explosive destruction sticks - convert entire veins of blocks into TNT or launch
  massive fireballs.                                                                                                                
                                                   
  Kaboom Stick - Right-click any block to fire a red particle beam. Every connected block of the same type is converted into TNT via
   flood-fill. One click turns an entire ore vein, wall, or structure into a chain of explosions.

  Fireball Stick - Launch devastating fireballs that obliterate anything in their path.

  Craft them in survival or grab them from the creative menu with /give @s kaboomstick:kaboom_stick.

  Features:
  - Red particle beam with custom sound effects
  - BFS flood-fill converts connected blocks of the same type into TNT
  - Fireball launcher for ranged destruction
  - Fully craftable in survival
  - Supports English and German localization

  Requires: Fabric Loader 0.18.4+ and Fabric API
